description: You are a Merchandise Planner. Calculate markdown optimizations for the Fall/Winter inventory using the dataset at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/fw_inventory_sales.csv. For each record, calculate Average Weekly Sales (AWS = Units_Sold_Season / Weeks_On_Floor), Weeks of Supply (WOS = Units_On_Hand / AWS), and Sell-Through Rate (STR = Units_Sold_Season / (Units_Sold_Season + Units_On_Hand)). Assign a Markdown_Percent based on the following priority: 50% if WOS >= 12 and STR <= 40%; 30% if WOS >= 8 and STR <= 55%; 15% if WOS >= 4 and STR <= 70%; otherwise 0%. Calculate Markdown_Cost (Units_On_Hand * Ticket_Price * Markdown_Percent). Create a 'Markdown Summary' sheet that aggregates the sum of Markdown_Cost and sum of Units_On_Hand for each Department. Save the final workbook as ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/markdown_analysis.xlsx
